mission.title: langflow: ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found. Please install it and try again
mission.description: ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found. Please install it and try again. This issue affects 6+ users.

steps.title: Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your langflow installation:
```bash
pip show langflow | grep Version
```
Look for the error: `ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found. Please install it and try again` followed by `Langflow shutdown complete`.

steps.title: Review the error
steps.description: Langflow fails to start with a `ModuleNotFoundError` for `langflow.base.astra_assistants.util`. This is caused by a missing or incorrectly packaged module in certain langflow releases.

steps.title: Apply the fix for ModuleNotFoundError
steps.description:
The fix ensures the `astra_assistants` module is correctly included in the langflow package. Upgrade to the version that includes this fix:
```bash
pip install --upgrade langflow
```
If you need a specific version:
```bash
pip install langflow>=<fixed-version>
```

steps.title: Confirm the issue is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by starting langflow:
```bash
langflow run
```
Confirm that `ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found` no longer appears and langflow starts successfully.

resolution.summary: Fixed the missing langflow.base.astra_assistants.util module by ensuring it is correctly included in the langflow package distribution.

prerequisites.description: Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Optionally Docker for containerized deployment.
